requirements.text: Preserve the deterministic `create-execplan` package flow: scaffold, manifest/result checkpointing, fresh `codex exec` phase runs, finalized `execplan.md`, generated runtime input, readiness audit, and handoff checklist.
Ensure a child phase run cannot invoke nested planning or child-agent orchestration; the effective execution boundary must remain one fresh Codex process working only on staged artifacts.
Add or tighten regression coverage so the isolation rule is testable with repo-local checks and a live Codex smoke, and the mock package can reach a green readiness audit.

tasks.expectedOutput: child schema and prompt reject recursive planning behavior and satisfy the current API schema contract
tasks.action: Update the phase controller so the child response schema is valid and the child prompt enforces an isolated single-process phase boundary.

tasks.expectedOutput: child runtime launches inside temporary `CODEX_HOME` with writable staged sandbox
tasks.action: Update the wrapper so child phases do not inherit global Codex home instructions or read-only defaults.

tasks.expectedOutput: helper regression suite asserts clean `CODEX_HOME`, isolated prompt wording, and schema completeness
tasks.action: Extend the helper checks to lock in the new wrapper and controller contract.
Run the helper regression suite after the controller and wrapper changes.
Run the live smoke to confirm a real child `codex exec` still works after the isolation changes.
